hero.subtitle: From home cleaning to salon services — book trusted professionals in minutes.

cta.customerDesc: Browse thousands of verified vendors, compare prices, and book in seconds. Your perfect service provider is just a tap away.
cta.vendorDesc: Join VendorCenter and reach thousands of customers in your area. Set up your profile, manage bookings, and watch your business grow.

howItWorks.title: How It
howItWorks.subtitle: Get your service done in 4 simple steps

location.title: Set Location
location.description: Allow GPS or enter your area to find nearby vendors

choose.title: Choose Service
choose.description: Browse categories and compare vendors by rating & price

book.title: Book & Confirm
book.description: Select time slot, confirm booking, and get instant updates

review.title: Rate & Review
review.description: Share your experience and help others find great vendors

categories.title: Browse by
categories.subtitle: Find the perfect service for your needs

featured.subtitle: Handpicked professionals near you
featured.noVendorsWithLocation: No nearby vendors found for your location yet.
featured.noVendorsNoLocation: Enable location to see nearby vendors.

scrollStory.label: Story
scrollStory.heading: A calm, premium booking flow built around one clear action.
scrollStory.subtitle: Scroll to move through the narrative—trust signal, booking preview, and a focused CTA—without breaking the visual rhythm.

trust.title: Trusted by real people
trust.description: 4.9/5 average satisfaction. Every vendor is verified, insured, and monitored.

booking.title: Book in one flow
booking.description: Pick a slot, lock price, and get instant confirmation—no clutter or distractions.

cta.title: Move with confidence
cta.description: A concierge-like CTA that keeps you focused on completing the booking.
cta.ctaMessage: Finish your booking with a single, focused CTA.
cta.ctaDescription: No extra cards or distractions—just the path to confirm with assurance and support.

about.tagline: VendorCenter connects customers with verified service professionals — making local services reliable, transparent, and easy to book.
about.whatDrivesUsSubtitle: Our core principles shape every feature, every interaction, and every vendor partnership on the platform.

trust.title: Trust & Transparency
trust.description: Vendor visibility is based on relevance, location, and verified profiles — no hidden promotions.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.description: Every vendor goes through verification. Service ratings and reviews keep quality accountable.

customer.title: Customer Focus
customer.description: From AI-powered discovery to secure payments — every feature is designed around customer confidence.

about.storyParagraph1: VendorCenter started as a simple idea: make it effortless for households to find trusted local service providers. From cleaning and electrical work to salon services and appliance repair — we're building a reliable ecosystem.
about.storyParagraph2: Based in Ratnagiri, Maharashtra, we're expanding across the state with a focus on quality, transparency, and innovation — including AI-powered service discovery.
about.ctaDescription: Discover trusted service professionals near you, or grow your business by joining as a vendor.
